name: control-mapping freshness gate: --emit-status writes a JSON status block conforming to section 2.8 freshness_at_generation enum (fresh-within-fetch-frequency | stale-warn-degraded | offline-cached | operator-bypass)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-12T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework nist-csf-2 --control-id GV.OC --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --emit-status "$PWD/status.json" && grep "fresh-within-fetch-frequency" status.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
